titleStmt.title: SII 15.605: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 605. (B.K. No. 17 of 1930-31.) IṄGAḶĒŚVAR, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Liṅgāyata-maṭha.
This is dated the cyclic year Āṅgirasa, Chaitra-pāḍiva, Monday. Palaeographically the record may be assigned to 13th century when the details correspond to 121 A.D., March 5, Monday, f.d.t. °02.
It records the death by samādhi of Sānti-seṭṭi, son of Aggaḷa-seṭṭi and a devout follower of the Jaina faith.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sthiratayinopputi¨rdda jinada¨rśanasadbrata
saccaritradiṁ paramajinābhiśē
ka varapūjanadiṁ nutasaṁghadānadiṁ surucira
kī¨rttimū¨rttisujanaṁ guṇiyaggaḷaseṭṭiyā
tmajaṁ paramanijāyuvaṁ taḷadu bhabyajanā
graṇi śāntanoppidaṁ . Oppi baḷikke dēvagatigo
ppire saṁdanama¨rtyalōkadoḷu tappade jainamaṁ
diranikāyamana¨rtthiye baṁdipadadi mu
ppurujādiyillada susaukhyamanuṇbanu rāga
bhāvadiṁ kappurapuṁjadaṁte sale kāyama
na¨rtthipa śāntanuttamaṁ . yesadiraluttamāṁgirada cai
trada pāḍiva sōmavāradoḷu pasarasayātma
bhāvana samādhiyoḷoṁdire dēvalōkamaṁ pāli
salene sāṁtiseṭṭi jagavoppire baṇnisa pokkanu
nnataṁmasamasamāstrasannibha
pasurabrajabhōgada¨rtthigaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.605 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
